description: Schema for reusable per-map theme definitions consumed by src/map-theme-runtime.js. One shared scene/theme system; each map replaces only theme data. Aligned to the Map 1 visual lock contract (map1.arena_ruins.visual_lock.v1).

themeDefinition.name: string — display name
themeDefinition.enabled: boolean — disabled themes are metadata only; activateTheme rejects them safely
themeDefinition.contract: string — visual lock contract id this theme implements (optional)
themeDefinition.palette: object — named color values (hex numbers) used by the layer builders
themeDefinition.layers: string[] — must list the six layer names above

budgetFields.particles: int — ambient particle count (first to degrade)
budgetFields.lightShafts: int — decorative light shafts (0 below high)
budgetFields.motion: boolean — decorative motion enabled (removed at low)

themeDefinition.lighting: object — fill/rim intensities; theme lighting only ADDS lights, never replaces the game key light, camera, background or fog

themes.note: metadata only — no scene, no artwork until Map 2 production
metadata only — no scene, no artwork until Map 3 production
